faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Harrison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment services in Harrison typically range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in Harrison homes?
faqs.answer: Most Harrison homeowners notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as we target fleas at all life stages. We recommend follow-up treatments to ensure all eggs and larvae are eliminated, preventing re-infestation.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in Harrison?
faqs.answer: Yes, our flea treatment methods are completely safe for pets and children when applied by our certified technicians. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry, then they can safely return.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment service in Harrison?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Harrison, NJ. We understand how uncomfortable and distressing flea infestations can be, so we prioritize rapid response. Contact us before noon for potential same-day service, and we'll dispatch a technician to your Harrison property as quickly as possible.
